issue: slide title (methods_summary): 336 chars at base 28pt in 9.32×0.63 in box requires sub-floor shrink; clamped at 60%; title-length cap recommended (G.10-C content_overflow)
fix_hint: The slide's title overflows its slot at the 60% projection-legibility floor. Edit the title field (content.title, or content.unified_point / content.headline / content.question depending on layout) to be ≤120 chars for talk-30 mode. Preserve the substantive claim; cut hedges, qualifiers, parenthetical asides. A title is one tight clause, not a summary paragraph.
